name: Houston Independent School District
about: Houston Independent School District (HISD) is the largest school district in Texas and among the largest in the United States, serving approximately 194,000 students across more than 280 schools in Houston, Texas.
calendarNotes: Houston ISD typically starts in early August — among the first major urban districts in the country to open — reflecting Texas rules that allow school to begin before the fourth Monday in August. Families relocating from the Northeast or West Coast should plan end-of-summer activities accordingly. Spring Break falls in mid-March, which makes Houston one of the earlier Spring Break markets nationally. South Padre Island and Cancún are popular destinations for Houston families during this window, so travel prices spike quickly. Summer break correspondingly runs longer than in most other states. Families with children switching between HISD and suburban Harris County districts like Katy ISD or Cypress-Fairbanks ISD should verify start dates, as they may differ by a few days.
